hero.title: Plan Unforgettable Events
hero.subtitle: From bachelor parties to birthdays, organize group events with ease. Smart cost splitting, AI-powered suggestions, and real-time collaboration.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Plan your event in 4 simple steps

step1.title: Create Event
step1.description: Choose your event type and set basic details

step2.title: Invite Guests
step2.description: Share a simple link or code with your group

step3.title: Collect Preferences
step3.description: Let guests vote on dates, destinations, and activities

step4.title: Plan Together
step4.description: Use AI suggestions and collaboration tools to finalize plans

eventTypes.title: Perfect for Any Event
eventTypes.subtitle: Whether it's a wild weekend or an intimate gathering

testimonials.title: Loved by Event Planners
testimonials.subtitle: See what our users have to say

testimonial1.text: EventBliss made planning my friend's bachelor party so easy! Everyone could vote and we found the perfect date.
testimonial1.author: Sarah M.

testimonial2.text: The cost splitting feature is a lifesaver. No more awkward money conversations!
testimonial2.author: Michael K.

testimonial3.text: I've organized 5 events with EventBliss. The AI suggestions are incredibly helpful.
testimonial3.author: Anna L.

multiDevice.title: Plan Events Anywhere, Anytime
multiDevice.description: Access EventBliss from any device. Our responsive design ensures a seamless experience.

socialProof.quote: Join thousands of happy event planners

premium.sectionSubtitle: Get access to advanced features and plan like a pro

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Yes! EventBliss is free for basic event planning. Premium features are available for power users.
faq.q2: How many guests can I invite?
faq.a2: You can invite unlimited guests to your event. There are no restrictions.
faq.q3: Can I use EventBliss for business events?
faq.a3: Absolutely! EventBliss is perfect for team building, corporate retreats, and company parties.
faq.a4: Yes, we take security seriously. All data is encrypted and stored securely in the cloud.
faq.a5: Premium unlocks advanced features: unlimited AI suggestions, custom survey questions, advanced message templates, and priority support.
faq.a6: Yes! For a one-time payment of €19.99 you get lifetime access to all premium features.
faq.q7: How does the Agency Directory work?
faq.a7: Find professional bachelor party agencies in 50+ cities. Filter by country, city, and view details directly on the interactive map.

imprint.title: Imprint
imprint.disputeText: The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (ODR).

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Your privacy is important to us. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your data.

dataCollection.title: Data Collection
dataCollection.content: We collect information you provide directly, such as name, email, and event preferences.

dataUsage.title: Data Usage
dataUsage.content: Your data is used to provide and improve our services, facilitate event planning, and communicate with you.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.content: We use cookies to enhance your experience and analyze site usage.

dataSecurity.title: Data Security
dataSecurity.content: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your data.

userRights.title: Your Rights
userRights.content: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data at any time.

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Services
thirdParty.content: We may share data with trusted partners to provide our services.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: For privacy-related inquiries, please contact us at:

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By using EventBliss, you agree to these terms. Please read them carefully.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing or using EventBliss, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service.

services.title: Our Services
services.content: EventBliss provides event planning and coordination tools for groups.

payment.title: Payment Terms
payment.content: Basic features are free. Premium features may require payment.

prohibited.title: Prohibited Activities
prohibited.content: You may not use our services for illegal activities or to harm others.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.content: EventBliss is not liable for damages arising from use of our services.

changes.title: Changes to Terms
changes.content: We may update these terms. Continued use constitutes acceptance.

governingLaw.title: Governing Law
governingLaw.content: These terms are governed by the laws of Cyprus.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.intro: Please read this disclaimer carefully before using EventBliss.

general.title: General Disclaimer
general.content: Information provided on EventBliss is for general purposes only.

externalLinks.title: External Links
externalLinks.content: We are not responsible for content on third-party websites.

availability.title: Service Availability
availability.content: We strive for 99.9% uptime but cannot guarantee uninterrupted service.

limitation.title: Limitation of Liability
limitation.content: We are not liable for any indirect or consequential damages.

contact.title: Contact
contact.content: For questions about this disclaimer, please contact us.

proTip.title: Pro Tip
proTip.description: Copy the messages and share them directly via WhatsApp or other messengers for best results.

kickoff.title: Kickoff Message
kickoff.template:
Hey everyone! 🎉

It's happening - we're planning the party for {{honoree}}! 🥳

To help us organize the perfect event, we need your input!

👉 Please fill out this quick survey:
{{surveyLink}}

🔑 Access code: {{accessCode}}

The survey only takes 2-3 minutes and helps us with:
📅 Date selection
💰 Budget planning
🎯 Activity selection
📍 Destination choice

The sooner everyone responds, the sooner we can get started! 🚀

Questions? Let me know!

Cheers 🙌

welcome.title: Welcome
welcome.template:
Welcome to the team! 🙌

Great to have you on board for {{honoree}}'s party!

Here's the key info:

📋 Survey: {{surveyLink}}
🔑 Code: {{accessCode}}

If you haven't responded yet, please do so ASAP!

Any questions, just reach out. We're going to have an epic time! 🚀

reminder.title: Reminder
reminder.template:
Hey! 👋

Quick reminder about the survey for {{honoree}}'s party!

🔗 {{surveyLink}}
🔑 Code: {{accessCode}}

So far {{responseCount}} of {{totalCount}} have responded.

Please fill it out so we can continue planning! 🙏

Only takes 2 minutes! ⏱️

deadline.title: Deadline Warning

dateConfirmed.title: Date Confirmed!
dateConfirmed.template:
🎉 THE DATE IS SET! 🎉

{{honoree}}'s party will be on:

📅 {{eventDate}}

Please mark your calendars and keep this date free!

More details coming soon... 👀

Questions? Let me know!

budget.title: Budget Info
budget.template:
💰 BUDGET UPDATE 💰

Here are the estimated costs for {{honoree}}'s party:

📊 Estimated cost per person: €{{budgetPerPerson}}

This includes:
• [Activity 1]
• [Activity 2]
• [Accommodation/Transport]

Please transfer €{{depositAmount}} deposit by {{depositDeadline}}.

Bank details:
[Insert IBAN]

Questions about the budget? Let me know!

locationShare.title: Meeting Point

finalDetails.title: Final Details
finalDetails.template:
🎊 IT'S TIME! 🎊

{{honoree}}'s party is just around the corner!

📅 {{eventDate}}
📍 {{destination}}

⚠️ IMPORTANT:
• Be on time at the meeting point
• Phone charged
• Bring good vibes! 😄

🤫 SECRECY:
{{honoree}} must NOT find out anything!

Questions? Call, DON'T message in the group!

Get ready for an unforgettable event! 🔥

packingList.title: Packing List
packingList.template:
🎒 PACKING LIST for {{honoree}}'s party 🎒

📅 {{eventDate}}
📍 {{destination}}

✅ MUST-HAVES:
• ID
• Cash (approx. €{{cashAmount}})
• [Special clothing]
• Good vibes! 😄

👕 DRESS CODE:
[Insert dress code]

❌ DON'T FORGET:
• [Important item]
• [Another important thing]

Questions? Let me know!

Get ready for an amazing event! 🚀

thankYou.title: Thank You
thankYou.template:
🙏 THANK YOU EVERYONE! 🙏

{{honoree}}'s party was a huge success! 🎉

Thanks to each and every one of you for:
• The amazing vibes
• Your help with the planning
• The unforgettable moments

📸 Please share photos/videos in the group!

💰 Cost breakdown coming in the next few days.

It was an honor organizing this with you! 🙌

Until the next adventure! 🚀
